focusPoints.label: How they're sequencing the top-three initiatives.
focusPoints.reason: Standard bi-weekly anchor for a Lead — knowing how they're prioritizing their initiatives helps ensure alignment with team and company goals.

focusPoints.label: Feedback landing — both directions.
focusPoints.reason: At Lead level, feedback loops are critical for personal and team growth — understanding how feedback is being given and received is essential.

focusPoints.label: Motivation trend vs three months ago.
focusPoints.reason: Bi-weekly check-in for a Lead should include a pulse check on their motivation and energy levels to ensure sustainability and address any potential burnout signals.
